latest.contents:
Commands: create create a new project start start the development server build build (bundle + export) site for production bundle bundle webpack assets export export html from bundled assets help [cmd] display help for [cmd]

Examples:

$ react-static -v $ react-static create $ react-static start $ react-static build $ react-static bundle $ react-static export
